reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención. Tenemos techo alto no entra para cargar combustible hay una camioneta de servicio mecánico que no la quiere correr para que podamos cargar

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disaster. We have a high roof, but we can't get in to refuel. There's a service truck that they refuse to move so we can fill up.

reviews.comment:
Una de las pocas estaciones de la zona. No tiene GNC. Es una estación chica, no tiene tienda de YPF full pero tiene todo lo q se necesita de una estación de servicio. Hasta perritos vagabundos que nos desean bien viaje. Y de yapa, un señor vendiendo semitas c chicharrón q estaban buenísimas... Nos alegro el viaje. Volveremos

(Translated by Google)
One of the few gas stations in the area. It doesn't have CNG. It's a small station, it doesn't have a full YPF convenience store, but it has everything you need from a gas station. Even stray dogs wished us a safe trip. And as a bonus, a man selling semitas with pork rinds that were delicious... It made our trip much better. We'll be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGV1RsQnhVVFI2YjBab00wMWxNa00yWDFaek9VRRAB

reviews.comment:

I met a Chilean friend here many years ago, and we're still in touch 😀

reviews.comment:
Una sola persona atendiendo. Once vehículos esperando a ser atendidos. Hace media que estanos esperando que nos atiendan y recién comenzaron a hacer el cambio de turno los dos empleados (el que se va y el que se queda) adentro de la oficina y nosotros seguimos esperando.
Los baños sucios.
Espero puedan mejorar el servicio

(Translated by Google)
Only one person working. Eleven vehicles waiting to be served. We've been waiting for half an hour, and the two employees (the one leaving and the one staying) just started the shift change inside the office, and we're still waiting.
The restrooms are dirty. I hope you can improve the service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SV2FuRTBhekpwZGxSMlEzUklZM0YzYW0xMVYwRRAB
